NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE AND DEFENDANT'S REPRESENTATIVE WAS UNWILLING TO WAIVE SERVICE OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AT TODAY'S HEARING. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
